title: Signature parser accepts truncated header: missing closing quote silently tolerated
description:
LOCATION: src/signatures.rs:121-127

FINDING: parse_signature_header calls strip_suffix on a double-quote char. If split_signature_params returns a part where the closing quote is absent (truncated Signature header), strip_suffix returns the original val via unwrap_or, silently accepting the malformed parameter. The malformed value then propagates to base64 decode where it fails with a generic error, giving no indication that the header was structurally invalid.

IMPACT: Malformed Signature headers with missing closing quotes produce confusing 401 responses with no parse-level error log. Complicates debugging of federation interop issues. A stricter parser would reject at the structural level.
close_reason: Fixed: SignatureParts parser returns error on missing closing quote
